game_name: Double Dragon III: The Sacred Stones
extraction_note: The Wikipedia source provided documents the arcade version (Double Dragon 3: The Rosetta Stone, 1990) and other ports, but contains no music/audio documentation. No tempo, keys, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics are documented in the available source. The NES version (Double Dragon III: The Sacred Stones, 1991) is mentioned only as a separate game with a redirect reference, but no audio details are provided for either version.
